immediate_analysis_rules: Treat plugins as a first-class asset bucket rather than scattered product changes.
Track new crates and crate splits explicitly; do not let codex-core absorb their ownership in summaries.
Use the local/remote/handler pattern as an analysis tag for execution-related crates.
Prefer artifact-first summaries over direct TUI/app-server shape commitments while upstream remains volatile.
Invalidate cached structural outputs whenever Cargo.lock or the promoted crate set changes.

codex-login.why_relevant: Auth moved out of codex-core into a dedicated crate, changing package ownership and cross-crate authority assumptions.
recent_signals: Auth implementation and token data moved into codex-login.

codex-features.why_relevant: Feature policy moved into a dedicated crate, materially changing where feature gating and warnings live.
recent_signals: Feature system split into codex-features across many workspace consumers.
